allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(dashboard\): complete redesign proposal with clean HTML/CSS base

- Add dashboard-pro-v2.html: semantic SPA shell with 3-area CSS Grid
  layout \(sidebar + topbar + content\), 7 views \(overview, live RFID,
  logs, alerts, QR, users, devices, settings\), accessible markup
  \(aria-live, aria-current, role landmarks\), HTML entities for all
  Latin characters to fix encoding issues, modals and toast container
- Add css/dashboard-pro-v2.css: modern dark SaaS admin CSS \(~900 lines\)
  built on tokens.css palette; includes sidebar collapse animation,
  mobile off-canvas sidebar, KPI grid, virtual scroller, skeleton
  loaders, status dots, alert cards, device cards, modals, toasts,
  full responsive breakpoints \(1100px / 768px / 480px\)
- Add REFACTOR-CHECKLIST.md: 10-phase refactor plan covering legacy
  file cleanup, console.log removal, encoding fixes, CSS consolidation,
  JS modular architecture, Firestore Security Rules + index guidance,
  accessibility audit, responsive QA, and Firebase Auth integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
